titleStmt.title: SII 24.160: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 160. (A.R. No. 35 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land by purchase by Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷa-Perumāḷ, son of Irāyāṉ Koṇḍanambi-śeṭṭi of Kuḷamukku in Malaimaṇḍalam, to Tiruvaraṅgamāḷi-Nambi of Nālūr, a Śrīvaishṇava of Tiruvaraṅgam, for a flower-garden to god Śrīraṅganātha. The record is dated in the 26th regnal year of the king and the details viz., Dhanus, śu. 3, Saturday, Tiruvōṇam regularly correspond to A.D. 1241, December 7, Saturday; ·28; ·76.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī rājarāja tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 6 vatu dhanu nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu tritiyaiyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ malai maṇṭalattu kuḷamukku yirāyāṉ koṇṭanampi ceṭṭi
yār makaṉ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷeṉ Iṉakku naṉṟākat tiruppati śrī vaiṣṇavarkaḷil nālūṟ tiruvaraṅkamāḷi nampi śrī raṅganātaṉukkut tiru nantavaṉañ ceytu tirumālai Eṭuppatāka yivaṟku nāluṟ cirāmanampi pakkal koṇṭu viṭṭa tirunantavaṉa
māvatu . tirukkuṟaippaṟṟu vaṭavoḻukkil tiruccolaippiccar tirunantavaṉat tukku meṟku Iccirāmanampi tirunantavaṉattukku naṭuvuḷpaṭṭa tirunantavaṉaṅ kiḻ mel kol 2 Ikkoliraṇṭum Āṟāyiraṅkācukkuk koṇṭu viṭukaiyilt tirunanta
vaṉattu Iṭṭu tiruppaḷḷittāmam vaittākki nāḷtoṟu moru tirumālai cāttak kaṭavatākavum paḷḷa(m)mum viḷainilamum paṭukaiyum payiṟ ceytu koṇṭu koyiṟ kaṭamaiyiṟuttu mikuti jivaṉa ceṣamākak koḷḷak kaṭavatākavum mittammañ cantirātittavaṟ
celvatāka niścayittu Ittirunantavaṉaṅ koliraṇṭum Ivaṟkuk kāṇiyākak koṇṭu viṭṭu Ippaṭikkuk kalveṭṭik kuṭutten nālūṟ tiruvaraṅkamāḷi nampikku Ikkuḷa mukku yirāyāṉ koṇṭa nampi ceṭṭiyār makaṉ Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap peru
māḷeṉ Itu śrī vayiṣṇavarkaḷ rakṣai .§
Digital edition of SII 24.160 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
